nasb.text: It is like the precious oil upon the head, Coming down upon the beard, Even Aaron’s beard, Coming down upon the edge of his robes.

esv.text: It is like the precious oil on the head, running down on the beard, on the beard of Aaron, running down on the collar of his robes!

cnv.text: 這好比那珍貴的油澆在亞倫的頭上， 流到鬍鬚， 又從亞倫的鬍鬚， 流到他的衣領上。

ccb.text: 这就像珍贵的膏油倒在亚伦头上， 流到他的胡须， 又流到他的衣襟；

csbs.text: 这就像浇在亚伦头上贵重的膏油， 流到他的胡须，又流到他的衣襟；
